task: Browse the upcoming SuperBike events taking place in Italy.
graderReasoning: The task was to browse upcoming SuperBike events taking place in Italy on redbull.com. The trajectory shows the agent navigated to Red Bull Events, removed the US country filter, selected Italy, then selected the Superbike discipline. The resulting Red Bull page explicitly displayed “Sorry! No results found.” with a clear filtered state of Italy + Superbike + Upcoming. The agent also checked Red Bull’s WorldSBK series page and confirmed it only showed 2025 Italy rounds and no 2026/upcoming Italy results on redbull.com. Although the agent additionally consulted worldsbk.com and mentioned those results, the final clarification correctly states the Red Bull-only outcome: there were no upcoming Superbike events in Italy available on redbull.com. That satisfies the browsing task because a verified ‘no results found’ state is a valid completion.
final_result_response:
On **redbull.com**, there were **truly zero upcoming Italy Superbike results**.

What Red Bull did show:
- The Red Bull Events page filtered to **Italy + Superbike + Upcoming** returned: **“Sorry! No results found.”**
- The Red Bull WorldSBK series page only showed **2025** data. It listed Italy rounds, but they were past/replay events:
  - **WorldSBK Italian Round**, May 2-4, 2025, Cremona Circuit, Italy
  - **WorldSBK Emilia-Romagna Round**, June 13-15, 2025, Misano World Circuit Marco Simoncelli, Italy <citation refs="fetch_call_DQsPmqojO2cCOgfyrPYx2By2|fc_0cfdeeb49cbf0b9f016a050f8908f8819880bbd6f8635fc784#1">Red Bull’s WorldSBK series page lists “WorldSBK Italian Round May 2 – 4, 2025 Cremona Circuit, Italy” and “WorldSBK Emilia-Romagna Round June 13 – 15, 2025 Misano World Circuit Marco Simoncelli, Italy,” both with replay links.</citation>
- The season selector I opened on Red Bull only showed **2024** and **2025**, not 2026.
- The guessed 2026 Red Bull event URLs opened as **404 Page Not Found** in the browser.

So the correct Red Bull-only answer is: **no upcoming Superbike events in Italy were available on redbull.com at the time I browsed.**
action_history: Opening Red Bull website: const rbPage1 = await openTab('https://www.redbull.com/');
Opening Red Bull events page: await rbPage1.locator('e268').click();
Opening Red Bull events page: await rbPage1.locator('e6').click();
Opening WorldSBK event series: const sbPage2 = await openTab('https://www.redbull.com/us-en/event-series/fim-superbike-world-championship');
Opening 2026 Emilia-Romagna WorldSBK event: const erPage3 = await openTab('https://www.redbull.com/us-en/events/fim-superbike-world-championship-emilia-romagna-round-2026');
Opening Italian Round event page: const itPage4 = await openTab('https://www.redbull.com/us-en/events/fim-superbike-world-championship-italian-round-2026');
